items.content:
About This Role

We are looking for a DevOps Engineer to help us build and maintain the infrastructure that powers our platform. You will work at the intersection of software development and operations, automating everything from CI/CD pipelines to cloud infrastructure provisioning.

Our team manages a multi-region Kubernetes deployment serving millions of requests per day, and we need someone who thrives in that kind of environment.

Responsibilities

  • Design, implement, and maintain CI/CD pipelines for multiple application services
  • Manage and optimize Kubernetes clusters across AWS regions
  • Implement infrastructure as code using Terraform and CloudFormation
  • Build monitoring, alerting, and observability solutions using Datadog and Grafana
  • Automate security patching, compliance checks, and disaster recovery procedures
  • Collaborate with development teams to improve deployment velocity and reliability

Requirements

  • 4+ years of experience in DevOps, SRE, or infrastructure engineering
  • Strong experience with AWS services (EKS, RDS, S3, Lambda, IAM)
  • Proficiency with Kubernetes, Docker, and Helm charts
  • Experience with Terraform or similar infrastructure-as-code tools
  • Scripting skills in Bash, Python, or Go

Nice to Have

  • AWS or GCP professional certifications
  • Experience with service mesh technologies like Istio or Linkerd
  • Familiarity with GitOps workflows using ArgoCD or Flux
